name: @ggsvelte-bench/benchmarks
description: mitata benchmarks for the ggsvelte pipeline + SVG renderer (plan: instrumented from the walking skeleton). `bun run bench` for the full suite, `bun run bench:smoke` for the CI smoke (1k only), `bun run bench:json` to emit bench-results.json (repo root), `bun run bench:budgets` to gate it against budgets.json (M3).
